zh.lifeSummary: 當Landgraf Heinrich I. von Hessen於1244年6月24日出生在比利時福拉阿姆-布拉班特洛文時，他的父親Hendrik II 'de Edelmoedige' van Brabant55歲，母親Sophie von Thüringen Herzogin von Brabant20歲。他於1263年9月10日與Adelheid von Braunschweig-Lüneburg結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1308年12月21日在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇賀瑟馬布格享年64歲，埋葬在德國海因里希_賀瑟-納斯奧可萊斯 馬布格。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Landgraf Heinrich I. von Hessen于1244年6月24日出生在比利时福拉阿姆-布拉班特洛文时，他的父亲Hendrik II 'de Edelmoedige' van Brabant55岁，母亲Sophie von Thüringen Herzogin von Brabant20岁。他于1263年9月10日与Adelheid von Braunschweig-Lüneburg结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1308年12月21日在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇賀瑟馬布格享年64岁，埋葬在德国海因里希_賀瑟-納斯奧可萊斯 馬布格。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Hessen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erna.  Scandinavian Hjalmer.

habitational name for someone from the territory of Hesse (German Hessen), a region (present-day federal state) in Germany named with the German dative plural form of the name of its inhabitants, the Hessians. Compare Hess 1.

variants.name: Haessig
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Reiner.
habitational name for someone from the territory of Hesse, from the adjectival form of its German name (see   Hessen   1).

variants.name: Hesser
meanings: nickname for a chaser at a hunt, from an agent derivative of Middle High German hessen ‘to hound’.
habitational name for someone from Hesse (see   Hessen   1).

variants.name: Hess
meanings: German, Dutch, Danish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from the territory of Hesse (see   Hessen   1).
South German: from a short form of the personal name Matthäus (see Matthew ).
German and Dutch: from the ancient Germanic personal name Hesso, a derivative of a compound name formed with hadu ‘strife’ as the first element, or from a pet form of Herman or Hendrik (see Henry 1).

nameMeanings.name: Heinrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Landgraf Heinrich I. von Hessen was born on 24 June 1244, in Leuven, Flemish Brabant, Belgium, his father, Hendrik II 'de Edelmoedige' van Brabant, was 55 and his mother, Sophie von Thüringen Herzogin von Brabant, was 20. He married Adelheid von Braunschweig-Lüneburg on 10 September 1263. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 21 December 1308, in Marburg, Hesse, Holy Roman Empire, at the age of 64, and was buried in Marburg, Hesse-Nassau, Prussia, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Landgraf Heinrich I. von Hessen est né le 24 juin 1244, à Leuven, Brabant Flamand, Belgique, son père, Hendrik II 'de Edelmoedige' van Brabant, avait 55 ans et sa mère, Sophie von Thüringen Herzogin von Brabant, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Adelheid von Braunschweig-Lüneburg le 10 septembre 1263. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 21 décembre 1308, à Marburg, Hessen, Saint-Empire romain, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Kreis Marburg, Hessen-Nassau, Prusse, Allemagne.

de.Nassau, Deggendorf, Bayern, Germany: Nassau, Offenberg, Landkreis Deggendorf, Bayern, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Landgraf Heinrich I. von Hessen am 24. Juni 1244 in Leuven, Flämisch Brabant, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hendrik II 'de Edelmoedige' van Brabant 55 und seine Mutter Sophie von Thüringen Herzogin von Brabant 20. Er hat am 10. September 1263 Adelheid von Braunschweig-Lüneburg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 21. Dezember 1308 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Marburg, Hessen, Heiliges Römisches Reich und wurde in Kreis Marburg, Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Landgraf Heinrich I. von Hessen è nato il il 24 giugno 1244 nel Leuven, Vlaams-Brabant, Belgio, il suo padre, Hendrik II 'de Edelmoedige' van Brabant, aveva 55 anni e il suo madre, Sophie von Thüringen Herzogin von Brabant, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Adelheid von Braunschweig-Lüneburg il 10 settembre 1263. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 21 dicembre 1308, nel Marburg, Hessen, Heiliges Römisches Reich, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Kreis Marburg, Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Landgraf Heinrich I. von Hessenが1244年6月24日にベルギーvラアムス-ブラバントレウベンで生まれた時，父Hendrik II 'de Edelmoedige' van Brabantは55歳，母Sophie von Thüringen Herzogin von Brabantは20歳であった。1263年9月10日にAdelheid von Braunschweig-Lüneburgと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1308年12月21日にヘイリジェズ ルoミシェス レイチヘセンマルブルグで64歳で死去し，ドイツプレウssンヘセン-ナッサウクレイス マルブルグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Landgraf Heinrich I. von Hessen(이)가 1244년 6월 24일 벨기에 블라아스-브라반트 레우븐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hendrik II 'de Edelmoedige' van Brabant(은)는 55세였고, 그의 어머니 Sophie von Thüringen Herzogin von Brabant(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1263년 9월 10일 Adelheid von Braunschweig-Lüneburg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1308년 12월 21일 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치 헤센 마버그에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 프레우ss 헤센-나소 크레이스 마버그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Landgraf Heinrich I. von Hessen nasceu em 24 de junho de 1244, em Leuven, Vlaams-Brabant, Bélgica, seu pai, Hendrik II 'de Edelmoedige' van Brabant, tinha 55 anos e sua mãe, Sophie von Thüringen Herzogin von Brabant, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Adelheid von Braunschweig-Lüneburg em 10 de setembro de 1263. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 21 de dezembro de 1308, em Marburg, Hessen, Heiliges Römisches Reich, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Kreis Marburg, Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Alemanha.

ru.Nassau, Deggendorf, Bayern, Germany: нассау, оффенбирг, ландкрис дегендорф, беиирн, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Landgraf Heinrich I. von Hessen родился 24 июня 1244 г. в местности леувен, влаамс-брабант, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Hendrik II 'de Edelmoedige' van Brabant было 55 лет, а матери, которую звали Sophie von Thüringen Herzogin von Brabant, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Adelheid von Braunschweig-Lüneburg 10 сентября 1263 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 21 декабря 1308 г. в местности марбург, Гессен, хилигесь рoмищесь раич в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности крис марбург, хессен-нассау, Пруссия, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Landgraf Heinrich I. von Hessen nació el 24 de junio de 1244, en Leuven, Vlaams-Brabant, Bélgica, su papá, Hendrik II 'de Edelmoedige' van Brabant, tenía 55 años y su mamá, Sophie von Thüringen Herzogin von Brabant, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Adelheid von Braunschweig-Lüneburg el 10 de septiembre de 1263. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 21 de diciembre de 1308, en Marburg, Hessen, Heiliges Römisches Reich, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Kreis Marburg, Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Alemania.
